description: Column-visibility profile that hides developer-facing Prompt Library columns from the technician view without deleting data.
policy: Hidden columns remain present, addressable by formulas, links, agents, and developer tooling. Column data must never be deleted.
hidden_columns_note: Default is empty (show all columns). The operator-modified workbook contains the preferred set; inspect it to populate this profile. Once populated, the generator will hide these columns during generation.
operational_notes: Developer-facing columns (F through N) contain critical data for agents and developer workflows.
Technicians may prefer to hide some of these columns for readability.
Do not delete any column; hidden columns remain fully functional.
The operator-modified workbook is the canonical source for the preferred hidden-column set.
